name: Cauliflower Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup white cheese, 50% fat, or salted cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix millet and rice into 3 cups of water and cook for about 30 minutes.
2. Chop cauliflower into small chunks and soak in plain or salted (optional) water.
3. Using a large cooking pot, saute onions in water and lemon juice.
4. Add basil and pepper to the pot and continue sauting until the onions are soft.
5. Add the cauliflower and steam until the cauliflower begins to turn soft (do not over-cook).
6. In a casserole dish, place the lightly cooked cauliflower and mix in the cooked millet and rice.
7. Once mixed, add the cheese and stir again.
8. Transfer the mixture into an oven-safe dish and bake at 375°F for 30 to 45 minutes.
